title: Postdoctoral Researcher
summary: University of Bremen, Hybrid Materials Interfaces Group (Feb 2022 - Jan 2025)
bullets: Built scalable simulation workflows translating physical experiments into automated Python/Bash pipelines.
Designed high-dimensional data-processing logic for 50GB+ datasets with zero validation loss.
Reduced HPC trial-and-error cycles by 50% through workflow automation.
Optimized HPC workflows with 10x speedup (100+ hours to under 12 hours).
